title: Harvesting Crops for XP
description: A mod that makes harvesting crops give XP to the player
body:
# Harvesting Crops for XP

## Content :

This mod allow you to gain XP upon harvesting mature crops with left click (destroy).
You can choose between spawning Experience orbs or giving xp directly to the player (or both !)
The amount of XP given to the player can be tweaked in the config file.

## Feedback :

It might not be compatible with all kind of crops (cocoa, modded, bushes, etc...) as the mod just released very recently. Please report anything that is not working properly and any feature you would love to see implemented !

## Licence :

Mod made by Thenemex, falls under the MIT licence.
Current logo made by a friend, unlicensed. (the ugliest it can be !)

# End of Modrinth support !
- The newest versions of the mod will only be available on [**CurseForge**](https://www.curseforge.com/members/thenemex/projects)
- These mods are essentially made for my modpack [**Thaumic Industries 2 - Expert**](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/modpacks/thaumic-industries-2-expert), but I try my best to bring new features and config tweaks for everyone to enjoy !
